---
title: "BI3010 Statistics for Biologists"
subtitle: "Workshop index"
author: "Roos & Pinard"
date: last-modified
date-format: "D MMMM YYYY"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: [cosmo, custom.scss]
    highlight-style: github
    embed-resources: true
    code-tools: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
.ws-index-group {
  margin: 2rem 0 0.5rem;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  color: #00635a;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #e8f5f0;
  padding-bottom: 0.3rem;
}
.ws-index-list {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0.5rem 0 0;
}
.ws-index-list li {
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f0f0f0;
}
.ws-index-list li:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}
.ws-index-list a {
  display: flex;
  align-items: baseline;
  gap: 1rem;
  padding: 0.65rem 0.25rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #0d1e2c;
  transition: background 0.12s;
  border-radius: 4px;
}
.ws-index-list a:hover {
  background: #f0faf7;
  color: #00635a;
  padding-left: 0.75rem;
}
.ws-num {
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #00b494;
  min-width: 2.5rem;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.ws-title {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}
</style>
```

<p class="ws-index-group">Foundations</p>
<ul class="ws-index-list">
  <li><a href="Workshop 1 - Hidden assumptions/workshop-1.html"><span class="ws-num">1</span><span class="ws-title">Getting Back into R</span></a></li>
  <li><a href="Workshop 1 - Hidden assumptions/workshop-1.5.html"><span class="ws-num">1.5</span><span class="ws-title">Hidden Assumptions</span></a></li>
  <li><a href="Workshop 2 - Data vis/workshop-2.html"><span class="ws-num">2</span><span class="ws-title">Data Visualisation</span></a></li>
</ul>

<p class="ws-index-group">Linear models</p>
<ul class="ws-index-list">
  <li><a href="Workshop 3 - LM with continuous predictor/workshop-3.html"><span class="ws-num">3</span><span class="ws-title">Linear Models with a Continuous Predictor</span></a></li>
  <li><a href="Workshop 4 - Diagnosing LM with continuous predictors/workshop-4.html"><span class="ws-num">4</span><span class="ws-title">Diagnosing Linear Models with a Continuous Predictor</span></a></li>
  <li><a href="Workshop 5 - LM with categorical predictors/workshop-5.html"><span class="ws-num">5</span><span class="ws-title">Linear Models with a Categorical Predictor</span></a></li>
  <li><a href="Workshop 6 - Diagnosing LM with categorical predictors/workshop-6.html"><span class="ws-num">6</span><span class="ws-title">Diagnosing Linear Models with a Categorical Predictor</span></a></li>
  <li><a href="Workshop 7 - LM with multiple predictors/workshop-7.html"><span class="ws-num">7</span><span class="ws-title">Linear Models with Multiple Predictors</span></a></li>
  <li><a href="Workshop 8 - LM with interactions/workshop-8.html"><span class="ws-num">8</span><span class="ws-title">Linear Models with Interactions</span></a></li>
</ul>

<p class="ws-index-group">Generalised linear models</p>
<ul class="ws-index-list">
  <li><a href="Workshop 9 - GLMs/workshop-9.html"><span class="ws-num">9</span><span class="ws-title">Poisson GLMs</span></a></li>
  <li><a href="Workshop 10 - Bernoulli GLMs/workshop-10.html"><span class="ws-num">10</span><span class="ws-title">Bernoulli GLMs</span></a></li>
</ul>
